_meta.notes: Verified from design-system submodule source. Do not re-derive — use this registry.

accordion-item.label: Accordion Item
accordion-item.description: Expandable/collapsible content container. Use multiple sibling instances to build a FAQ-style list. Each item is independently expandable.

slots.name: text
slots.example: Tuition covers instruction, campus resources, and...

attrs.name: data-theme
attrs.description: Light (default) or dark background with white/gold text and red accent.

attrs.name: data-visual-open
attrs.description: Initial state — true opens on load, false (default) starts closed.

variants.dark: Dark background, white/gold text with red accent

accordion-item.notes: Renders headline as a button with aria-expanded. Use for FAQ sections or progressively-disclosed content. Group multiple umd-element-accordion-item siblings for a full accordion.
